recommendations.title: Uncle Boonmee Who Can Recall His Past Lives
recommendations.overview: Suffering from acute kidney failure, Boonmee has chosen to spend his final days surrounded by his loved ones in the countryside. Surprisingly, the ghost of his deceased wife appears to care for him, and his long lost son returns home in a non-human f

recommendations.title: Tropical Malady
recommendations.overview: The passionate relationship between two men with unusual consequences. The film is divided in two parts. The first half charts the modest attraction between two men in the sunny, relaxing countryside and the second half charts the confusion and terro

recommendations.title: The Prestige
recommendations.overview: A mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a life-long battle for supremacy -- full of obsession, deceit and jealousy with dangerous and deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: I'm Thinking of Ending Things
recommendations.overview: Nothing is as it seems when a woman experiencing misgivings about her new boyfriend joins him on a road trip to meet his parents at their remote farm.

recommendations.title: The Loud House Movie
recommendations.overview: The Loud family travel to Scotland and discover they are descendants of Scottish royalty as they move into their giant ancestral castle.

recommendations.title: Slow West
recommendations.overview: In the Old West, a 17-year-old Scottish boy teams up with a mysterious gunman to find the woman with whom he is infatuated.

recommendations.title: Front of the Class
recommendations.overview: A boy with Tourette's syndrome overcomes criticism and discrimination to achieve his dream of becoming a teacher.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.
